arts.ttl: Bournemouth's Andoni Iraola addresses Tottenham links & Dean Huijsen's future amid Real Madrid speculation
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola addresses speculation linking him with Tottenham Hotspur as well as discussing Dean Huijsen's future at the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland reported to police after 'hitting club mascot on back of her head'
arts.sum: The woman, who was working as the club's alien mascot 'Moonbeam' was struck by the Norwegian forward before a match against Southampton, and had to be taken to hospital following the incident

arts.ttl: Man City 115 Premier League charges verdict timeline update as deadline emerges
arts.sum: Manchester City and the Premier League still await the verdict from their ten-week hearing held in front of an independent panel that took place at the end of last year

arts.ttl: Milos Kerkez drops big hint over future amid constant Liverpool links
arts.sum: Bournemouth defender Milos Kerkez has spoken out on persistent transfer links with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth injury news: Cherries receive Marcos Senesi boost ahead of Man City FA Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola is hopeful defender Marcos Senesi will make the matchday squad for Sunday's FA Cup quarter-final against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face Man City competition for Sanchez replacement
arts.sum: Chelsea face Man City competition for Sanchez replacement Chelsea and Manchester City are interested in Roma goalkeeper Mile Svilar, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man City's 115 charges key to Liverpool transfer blitz as FSG weigh Mohamed Salah and Virgil Van Dijk deals
Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola's side making 'big push' to hijack Liverpool's £33.5m Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement mission
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly making a 'big push' to hijack Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement mission.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea and Man City want £29m keeper who Mourinho once called a 'superhero', he's not happy with his current club
arts.sum: Chelsea and Manchester City are likely to be on the lookout for a new goalkeeper in the summer transfer window. Chelsea have had their fair...

arts.ttl: Dean Huijsen says defender Liverpool released is the most underrated Premier League centre-back ever
